key_value_pairs.description: A formal letter of appointment from the Hainan Association of Plant Engineering to Mr. Guido Walt, inviting him to be the honorary president.

signature.location: lower right corner of the document

form_fields.field_name: We Sincerely invite you to be the honorary president of Hainan Association of Plant Engineering.
form_fields.value: We Sincerely invite you to be the honorary president of Hainan Association of Plant Engineering.
